title: senecio fistulosus
intro: Senecio fistulosus, also known as Bladder Senecio or Jacob's Ladder, is a perennial plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio fistulosus include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Senecio fistulosus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
